description_long: This sculpture depicts a bust of a human figure adorned with an elaborate, tall headdress that extends vertically above the head and tapers to a point. The facial features are stylized, with a prominent nose and elongated chin, and the eyes are closed or deeply set, giving the figure a serene or contemplative expression. The headdress appears to have organic or symbolic elements, possibly referencing ancient or mythological iconography. The surface of the sculpture is rough and weathered, with a patinated, dark bronze or copper coloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with a visible label or tag affixed near the base. The overall form is compact, with the bust resting on a simple, irregular base.
description: A weathered bronze bust with a tall, pointed headdress and stylized facial features, finished in a dark patina.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the serene face, elongated chin, and the full height of the pointed headdress.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face and the vertical extension of the headdress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, the simple base, and a visible label or tag.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the head and headdress, with less facial detail visible.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human bust with tall headdress
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.

license_info.creator_display_name: Center for Digital Humanities of Perm University
